query:
-- Análisis de Usuarios
SELECT 
  'USUARIOS' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN role IN ('admin', 'super_admin') THEN 1 END) as admins,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN role = 'user' THEN 1 END) as usuarios_regulares,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN role IN ('diseñador', 'jefe_taller', 'operario', 'comercial') THEN 1 END) as equipo
FROM users;

-- Análisis de Clientes
SELECT 
  'CLIENTES' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%Demo%' OR name LIKE '%test%' THEN 1 END) as potencial_test,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN phone IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sin_telefono,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN email IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sin_email
FROM clients;

-- Análisis de Proyectos
SELECT 
  'PROYECTOS' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pendiente' THEN 1 END) as pendientes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('entregado', 'listo_instalacion') THEN 1 END) as completados,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%test%' THEN 1 END) as potencial_test
FROM projects;

-- Análisis de Citas
SELECT 
  'CITAS' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pendiente' THEN 1 END) as pendientes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('completada', 'cancelada') THEN 1 END) as finalizadas,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN createdAt > NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY THEN 1 END) as ultimos_7_dias
FROM appointments;

-- Análisis de Cotizaciones
SELECT 
  'COTIZACIONES' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'borrador' THEN 1 END) as borradores,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('enviada', 'aprobada') THEN 1 END) as enviadas_aprobadas,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN createdAt > NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY THEN 1 END) as ultimos_7_dias
FROM quotations;

-- Análisis de Gastos
SELECT 
  'GASTOS' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN expenseType = 'materiales_proyecto' THEN 1 END) as materiales,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN expenseType = 'gasto_operativo' THEN 1 END) as operativos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN receiptUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as con_comprobante
FROM expenses;

-- Análisis de Tareas
SELECT 
  'TAREAS' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pendiente' THEN 1 END) as pendientes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completada' THEN 1 END) as completadas
FROM tasks;

-- Análisis de Fotos de Proyecto
SELECT 
  'FOTOS_PROYECTO' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) as proyectos_con_fotos
FROM projectPhotos;

-- Análisis de Recordatorios
SELECT 
  'RECORDATORIOS' as tabla,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN completedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as completados,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN completedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as pendientes
FROM reminders;
